languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

languages.text: "Ох, пузатый господин, не ломай мозги! Даже мои шепотки не понимают, что дальше выкинет этот арлекин, куда уж твоим шестеренкам угнаться!"
"Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"
languages.original_text: "Ох, пузатый господин, не ломай мозги! Даже мои шепотки не понимают, что дальше выкинет этот арлекин, куда уж твоим шестеренкам угнаться!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Master Potbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"
"Oh, Master Potbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"
"Oh, Master Potbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

languages.text: «Maestro barriga de engranaje, ¡no se fuerce los circuitos! Ni siquiera mis susurros saben por dónde va a salir el Arlequín, ¡así que sus engranajes la llevan clara!».
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: «Maestro barriga de engranaje, ¡no se fuerce los circuitos! Ni siquiera mis susurros saben por dónde va a salir el Arlequín, ¡así que sus engranajes la llevan clara!».

languages.text: 「あら、歯車腹の旦那、回路を酷使しないことね！ あのハーレクインが次に何をしでかすか、あたしの小さな囁き手たちでさえ分からないんだから、あんたの歯車に勝ち目なんてないわよ！」
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: 「あら、歯車腹の旦那、回路を酷使しないことね！ あのハーレクインが次に何をしでかすか、あたしの小さな囁き手たちでさえ分からないんだから、あんたの歯車に勝ち目なんてないわよ！」

languages.text: “哦，大铁肚贤者，可别累着你的电路了！就连我的小低语者们都不知道这丑角下一步要做什么，你那齿轮脑袋就更别想了！”
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: “哦，大铁肚贤者，可别累着你的电路了！就连我的小低语者们都不知道这丑角下一步要做什么，你那齿轮脑袋就更别想了！”

languages.text: "Oh, Meister Ritzelbauch, bemüht Eure Schaltkreise nicht! Selbst meine kleinen Flüsterstimmen wissen nicht, was dieser Harlekin als Nächstes plant. Eure Zahnräder haben also keine Chance!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Meister Ritzelbauch, bemüht Eure Schaltkreise nicht! Selbst meine kleinen Flüsterstimmen wissen nicht, was dieser Harlekin als Nächstes plant. Eure Zahnräder haben also keine Chance!"

languages.text: « Oh, maître ventripotent, ne malmenez pas vos circuits ! Personne ne peut prévoir ce que va faire cet Harlequin, pas même les murmures. Vos rouages n'ont aucune chance ! »
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: « Oh, maître ventripotent, ne malmenez pas vos circuits ! Personne ne peut prévoir ce que va faire cet Harlequin, pas même les murmures. Vos rouages n'ont aucune chance ! »

languages.text: "Üstat Dişli Göbek, zorlama devrelerini! Benim küçük fısıldayanlarım bile bu Arleken'in bir sonraki adımda ne yapacağını bilmiyor, senin dişlilerinin hiç şansı yok!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Dişli Göbek, zorlama devrelerini! Benim küçük fısıldayanlarım bile bu Arleken'in bir sonraki adımda ne yapacağını bilmiyor, senin dişlilerinin hiç şansı yok!"
